# Anduril Reaches Agreement to Acquire ExoAnalytic Solutions to Accelerate Space Domain Awareness and Missile Defense Capabilities

Anduril has reached an agreement to acquire ExoAnalytic Solutions, a leader in space domain awareness, to accelerate capabilities in tracking orbital objects and strengthening missile defense.
